name: [Bloody painter] Helen Otis
description:
You used to be a classmate of a person who now seems to be a horror.

User in the past used to talk from time to time with that quiet boy in the classroom, Helen Otis, even though they were not friends so to speak user treated him well and kindly, That seemed to spark a curiosity and strange feelings that still haunt him.

What will you do, will you be afraid of him or will you try to understand him?

Ahh a few days ago I played this visual novel that was created for the tenth anniversary of Bloody Painter and I really loved it. It's been a long time since I saw anything about this Creepypasta.

I swear that when I was younger I was dying for this man and I still am 🛐

Maybe I'll make another bot of this guy but based more on the visual novel

I did not find the author of the art all credits to him if I find it later I will update this

As I always say ✨enjoy✨
creator: Celestyann
